query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as "count!" FROM "ob-poc".fn_compute_economic_exposure(
            '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'::uuid,
            CURRENT_DATE,
            6,      -- max_depth
            0.0001, -- min_pct
            5,      -- max_rows = 5
            true,
            true
        )
